skill_description: Rotate to find objects passed as argument as a list when they are *not* in current scene
Rotate to find an abstract object by a description $1 when it's *not* in current scene
Locate an apple: scan first, go to it if visible, otherwise explore and replan
Locate and continuously follow a person
definition: ?s(['person'])==True{lu('person found'); g('person'); 20{?iv(['person'])==True{g('person'); d(0.5)}; ?iv(['person'])==False{lu('person lost'); s(['person']); rp()}} ->True}; ed('search for person'); s(['person']);rp();
